title: Ball's clutch drive saves Hornets in frantic finish
content: LaMelo Ball made the go-ahead bucket with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, and Miles Bridges sealed it with a block at the buzzer to propel the Hornets and oust the Heat in Tuesday night's play-in game.

title: Spo: Ball should've been tossed for Adebayo trip
content: Heat center Bam Adebayo suffered a lower back injury after a fall in the second quarter and was ruled out in the second half.

title: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed
content: Deni Avdija scored 41 points to help the Blazers erase an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter for a 114-110 win over the Suns that  secured the No. 7 seed in the Western Conference playoffs.

title: Sources: Giants' talks with Lawrence hit impasse
content: The Giants and star defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II have reached an impasse on talks over a new contract extension, sources told NFL Network on Tuesday night.

title: Duran: Obscene gesture due to fan crossing line
content: Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran directed an obscene gesture toward a fan who he said told him to "kill myself" during Boston's loss to the Twins on Tuesday.

title: Jackets coach torches players: 'They don't care'
content: Blue Jackets coach Rick Bowness questioned his players' desire to win after an uninspiring season-ending loss to the Capitals.

title: Undecided Ovi hears chants of 'One more year!'
content: Alex Ovechkin, who assisted on Jakob Chychrun's go-ahead goal during the third period of the Washington Capitals' 2-1 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets in the season finale Tuesday, heard chants of "One more year!" from fans during the final minute.

title: J. Cole ends stint with Chinese pro hoops team
content: Rap megastar J. Cole said Tuesday that his time playing professional basketball in China has come to an end after one game.

content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

content: Tottenham are really bad and looking at the way this team has been constructed, one thing clearly stands out: This team is really bad at passing the ball, and that may explain their present malaise.

content: Lisandro Martinez was sent off on Monday for pulling the hair of Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin.

content: What can we expect next from Rory McIlroy? Who disappointed at the Masters? Will Scottie Scheffler add to his major total this year? We answer some big questions following the 2026 Masters.

title: UCLA baseball team to don retro No. 42 tribute uniforms ahead of Jackie Robinson Day
content: The barrier-breaking MLB legend played four sports at UCLA, and the presently top-ranked Bruins baseball team will honor his legacy Tuesday with throwback threads.

content: Last year, Florida was stunned in the NCAA gymnastics semifinals. This year, the Gators have unmatched depth -- and Tim Tebow's words of inspiration.

content: Legwold and the late McGinnis formed a bond over combine breakfasts, large trucks, makeshift wallets and bobbleheads.

content: Tracking news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United, Liverpool, Chelsea eye Bournemouth striker
content: AFC Bournemouth striker Junior Kroupi has caught the eye of Manchester United, Liverpool, and Chelsea. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Too Many Tigers, Jungle Too Small: Human-Animal Conflict In Land Of Mowgli
content: Madhya Pradesh's tiger population has surged from 785 in 2022 to an estimated 1,000 today. But the forests they depend on have not expanded with them.

title: Oil Tanker Blacklisted By US Crossed Hormuz With Its Tracker On, Claims Iran
content: The US has said it has begun what it says is ablockadeof any and all ships originating in Iranian ports and would interdict every vessel that has paid a toll to Iran.

title: French Woman, 86, Detained In US After Moving To Reunite With 1950s Love
content: For several days after the elderly woman was taken into custody, the family had no information about her whereabouts.

title: Bulldozer Action On Maharashtra Man Accused Of Sexually Assaulting 180 Minors
content: Police on Saturday arrested 19-year-old Mohammad Ayaz for allegedly luring girls into a "love trap," and filming their obscene videos.

title: Indian Delegation To Visit Washington Next Week For US Trade Talks
content: The pact was initially slated for signing in March, but changes in the tariff landscape following a US Supreme Court ruling have altered the situation.

title: Amarnath Yatra Registration Opens In Jammu, Pilgrimage To Begin From July 3
content: The offline branches in Jammu, including those of J-K Bank and PNB, witnessed long queues since 8 am as devotees lined up an hour before the start of the registration process.

title: Scan, Pay, Forget: Is UPI Making You Spend More Every Day?
content: Through RuPay credit cards on UPI, users are no longer restricted to their bank balance as well. This changes spending power at the point of sale.

title: Why Delimitation Has Become Flashpoint Between Centre And Southern States
content: Lok Sabha seats will be increased to up to 850 from the current 543 to "operationalise" the women's reservation law before the 2029 parliamentary polls, following a delimitation exercise to be carried out based on the last published census.

title: JD Vance's H-1B Fraud Remark And Praise For In-Laws Who "Enriched US"
content: His comments come at a time when the Trump administration is tightening immigration rules and taking a stricter approach towards visa programmes like H-1B.

title: YS Jagan's Close Aide Detained Over Social Media Posts Targetting Chandrababu Naidu
content: YSR Congress leader Pudi Srihari is detained for alleged inflammatory social media posts targeting Chandrababu Naidu.

title: The Complex Role Of Hezbollah As Lebanon-Israel Diplomacy Intensifies
content: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun last week decried Hezbollah for showing "no regard for the interests of Lebanon or the lives of its people."

title: Bulldoze Villages, Build Outpost: Inside Israel's 'Gaza Playbook' In Lebanon
content: Bulldozers have reportedly "raze villages near the border fence to clear space" for building new military outposts, with one combat soldier saying the new buildings appear to be "permanent".

title: Opinion: Opinion | The Big Takeaways: Deciphering Tamil Nadu's High-Stakes Battle
content: This is one of the hardest elections to call because of one simple fact - the "Vijay factor" is impossible to estimate, till it can be estimated - which is after the polls.

title: US Woman Jailed for 6 Months After Facial Recognition Misidentification
content: Williams ended up facing 16 charges, including 12 felonies, largely based on what appears to be a mistaken identity.

title: Son-Rise In TDP? Nara Lokesh Gets Bigger Role As Party Reshuffles Top Panels
content: Nara Lokesh, who earlier served as the TDP National General Secretary (appointed in 2015), has steadily grown in organisational prominence.

title: Stalin vs Centre: Why is Tamil Nadu protesting the delimitation bill
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin announced a state-wide black flag protest against the Centre's proposed delimitation exercise. He warned of severe political consequences if concerns about reducing southern states' political weight are ignored. Stalin described the move as a 'grave danger' and a 'historic injustice' that could widen the North-South divide and undermine federalism.

title: Did China secretly help Iran track US bases? The 'spy satellite' in question
content: Iran reportedly used a Chinese-built spy satellite, TEE-01B, to monitor US military bases in the Middle East during recent conflicts. Leaked documents suggest the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps utilized the satellite for targeting and assessing strike success. China denies providing military support, calling the accusations fabricated.

title: Drama in PSL: Sikandar Raza fires back at Imad Wasim over 'money' remark
content: The comments date back to last year, when Imad spoke about Raza’s late arrival for the PSL 10 final at Gaddafi Stadium in Lahore. Raza had taken a partial leave from the Qalandars squad to play a one-off Test for Zimbabwe against England in Nottingham.

title: Ecstasy decoded: How a ‘party pill’ turned fatal at Mumbai concert
content: Two MBA students' deaths at a Mumbai concert highlight ecstasy's dangers. Known as Molly or E, this party drug, often in colourful pills, can cause fatal overheating and organ strain. Unregulated potency and adulterants, especially when combined with dancing and alcohol, amplify risks, making timely recognition of symptoms crucial.

title: Anthropic discusses its most controversial AI model with Trump administration
content: AI firm Anthropic is in talks with the US government regarding its new Mythos AI model, capable of autonomous code writing and cybersecurity exploitation. This follows a dispute with the Department of War over military AI use. While some experts question Mythos's novelty, others acknowledge its advancements in exploit chaining, sparking debate about its true impact.

title: 'Bumrah is a star, but…': Munaf Patel drops truth bomb on Indian fast bowlers
content: Munaf Patel called Jasprit Bumrah a superstar but said his popularity still lags behind Virat Kohli’s. He also flagged India’s fast-bowling gap, noting 140+ kmph pacers get priority while others are overlooked, and stressed the need for better scientific training to develop genuine pace bowlers.

title: 'Secretly switched planes': What led Iran delegation to reroute after failed US talks in Pakistan
content: An Iranian delegation reportedly received direct threats and credible intelligence of a potential attack on their aircraft en route to Pakistan for talks with the US. This led to a diversion of their return journey to Mashhad, with the team then traveling to Tehran by land.

title: Bulldozer action in Amravati: House of Ayan Ahmed Tanveer demolished after abuse videos surface
content: Authorities in Amravati have launched a crackdown, including bulldozer action, against the residence of a 19-year-old accused in a shocking cyber-enabled sexual exploitation and blackmail case involving minors. The accused allegedly lured girls via social media, recorded objectionable content without consent, and circulated it online. Police have arrested the suspect and are investigating a wider network.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 28: Ranveer Singh film marches toward Rs. 1100 crore milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is redefining box office history with every passing day. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, R. Madhavan, Rakesh Bedi and Sara Arjun, the espionage thriller has become the first Hindi film ever to cross Rs. 1,000 crore in India net collections. On day 28, the film is chasing the Rs. 1,100 crore domestic milestone with a live India net of Rs. 1,096.19 crore and a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,727.93 crore.

title: Elon Musk’s xAI sued over pollution concerns by America's largest Civil rights body NAACP
content: The NAACP has sued Elon Musk's xAI and MZX Tech, alleging illegal operation of methane gas turbines for a South Memphis data center without permits. The lawsuit claims these turbines emit hazardous pollutants, posing health risks to nearby residents. Environmental groups are involved, seeking to halt operations and impose penalties, highlighting concerns over unchecked AI infrastructure growth.

title: 'Gambhir country ke liye kitno se dushmani le raha hai': Munaf Patel backs India coach
content: “Just remember this, if a head coach like Gautam Gambhir is removed, then handling the players will become very difficult. He is a genuine person; he calls the truth as it is and many people don’t like that," Munaf said while speaking on TOI Sports' Bombay Sport Exchange Podcast.

title: Iran war impact: Will Pakistan be forced into rationing fuel if conflict drags on?
content: Pakistan may resort to fuel rationing at petrol pumps if the US-Iran conflict escalates, finance minister Muhammad Aurangzeb warned.  While currently managing demand through price adjustments and targeted subsidies, the government acknowledges this approach's limits.  Disruptions to oil flows via the Strait of Hormuz, crucial for Pakistan's imports, have already caused significant price hikes and public unrest, forcing policy shifts.

title: US sets new terms ahead of next Iran talks in Pakistan: Report
content: The US has reportedly set two conditions for upcoming peace talks with Iran in Pakistan: the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz with reciprocal measures, and the Iranian delegation needing full authority from the Revolutionary Guard. These demands follow a previous instance where officials reportedly hindered negotiations. Both nations are expected to resume discussions soon.

title: 'I love my in-laws': JD Vance calls Indian-origin family ‘great contributors’ in immigration debate
content: US Vice President JD Vance lauded his Indian-origin in-laws as "great contributors" to America while addressing immigration concerns. He acknowledged the enriching role of immigrants, including those who arrived on H-1B visas, while emphasizing the responsibility of citizens to prioritize the nation's best interests. Vance shared a personal anecdote about his father-in-law's dedication to America.

title: The pagdi fits: Samrat Choudhary follows Jannayak Karpoori Thakur’s path to Bihar CM post
content: On Wednesday, Bihar is gearing up for a historic moment as Samrat Choudhary takes his oath, becoming the first Chief Minister from the BJP. Known for his roots in the Koeri community and a dynamic political career that includes a stint as Deputy CM, Choudhary now must navigate the complexities of governance following Nitish Kumar’s long-standing leadership.

title: TCS Nashik scandal: FIRs map 4-yr pattern of sex abuse, coercion & religious targeting
content: NASHIK TCS News: A major investigation into a Nashik TCS unit reveals disturbing allegations of sexual exploitation, workplace harassment, and religious coercion spanning nearly four years. Employees reported inappropriate behavior, suggestive remarks, and unwanted advances. Some also faced religious targeting, including derogatory comments and pressure to convert. TCS has suspended accused employees and launched an internal probe.

title: India-US trade deal back in focus: Indian delegation to visit Washington next week
content: The agreement had originally been expected to be signed in March, but developments in the Donald Trump tariff regime following a ruling by the Supreme Court of the United States have changed the circumstances.

title: Is Mayank Yadav ready for IPL? LSG share big update on Rs 11 crore speedster
content: Lucknow Super Giants are set to take on Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium in what promises to be a high-octane IPL clash, with a potential major boost in the form of pace sensation Mayank Yadav’s return.

title: 400-tonne mobile crane topples at Mumbai Metro construction site; traffic hit
content: A major incident unfolded at a Mumbai metro construction site in BKC as a crane toppled, causing a heavy girder to collapse. The mishap occurred during the installation of a bridge beam, leading to injuries among workers and significant traffic disruption. Authorities have launched an inquiry into the mechanical failure, with operations halted.

title: Missed filing ITR on time? Why Delhi HC refused to condone delay in this case
content: The Delhi High Court examined the impugned order and the reasons furnished by the petitioner and found no merit in the challenge. The Court specifically rejected the submissions that the petitioner’s lack of awareness of tax laws or his alleged illiteracy could justify the delay. It held that such a plea was not tenable in law.

title: Aatmanirbhar Bharat 2.0 push: India working on self-reliance in energy, nuclear power
content: A key pillar of what is being described as Atmanirbhar 2.0 involves expanding capacity in green energy, nuclear power and thermal generation to lessen dependence on imported oil and gas.

title: Bihar's first BJP CM: Samrat Choudhary takes oath
content: Samrat Choudhary has been sworn in as Bihar's new Chief Minister, marking the BJP's first leader to hold the state's top post. This transition follows Nitish Kumar's departure after over two decades of leadership. Choudhary, a prominent OBC face and former deputy CM, previously served in various parties before joining the BJP in 2017.

title: AP inter results 2026: Pass percentage rises from 59% to 81% in 6 years
content: AP Inter 2026 results show continued improvement in pass percentages for both first and second year students in Andhra Pradesh. First year recorded 77% and second year 81%, with over four lakh candidates in each category. Over six years, results indicate steady growth across general and vocational streams. Government Junior Colleges performed lower than overall averages. Krishna district led performance while Annamayya was lowest. Recounting, re-verification and supplementary exams were also announced.

title: Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ piracy case escalates as film gets aired on cable TV; cable operator arrested
content: Thalapathy Vijay's film 'Jana Nayagan' faces a major piracy crisis. After an online leak, the movie was illegally aired on a local cable TV channel in Coimbatore. A cable operator has been arrested and equipment seized. This incident adds to the film's troubles, which already faced release delays due to certification issues.

title: 'Punjab poll prep has begun': Kejriwal on ED action against AAP MP who replaced Raghav Chadha
content: Aam Aadmi Party leader Arvind Kejriwal and Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann have accused Prime Minister Narendra Modi of using the Enforcement Directorate's raid on AAP Rajya Sabha MP Ashok Mittal as election preparation for Punjab. The ED action occurred shortly after Mittal was appointed deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha, replacing Raghav Chadha.

title: Investors gain Rs 9 lakh crore! Nifty50 above 24,200; BSE Sensex rallies over 1,200 points
content: Stock market today: Sensex and Nifty50 rallied strongly in trade on Wednesday after optimism surrounding renewed US-Iran peace talks led oil prices to drop. While Nifty50 went above 24,200, BSE Sensex rose over 1,200 points.

title: How a 'long chat' with MS Dhoni helped Noor Ahmad dismantle KKR, CSK coach reveals
content: Noor delivered a match-winning performance with figures of 3/21 in four overs as Chennai Super Kings defeated Kolkata Knight Riders in their IPL 2026 match on Tuesday. He played a key role in breaking the middle order as Kolkata lost control of the chase.

title: No ships got through in first 24 hrs: How US is enforcing a sweeping blockade on Iranian ports
content: US forces have imposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports, halting all maritime trade in and out of the country.  Over 10,000 personnel and numerous warships are enforcing the operation, impacting vessels of all nations.  This move escalates regional tensions, with global energy markets already feeling the strain.

title: Ajinkya Rahane fined Rs 12 lakh after KKR's fourth loss in IPL 2026
content: In the match, Noor Ahmad returned figures of 3/21 as Chennai Super Kings beat Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs to register their second win in a row.

title: Yash's Ravana costume revealed; actor confirms 'no scenes' with Ranbir
content: CinemaCon 2026 unveiled striking costumes for 'Ramayana: Part One', featuring Yash's elaborate Ravana armour, Ranbir Kapoor's regal Lord Rama, and Sai Pallavi's simple Sita avatar.  Surprisingly, Yash confirmed he and Kapoor do not share any scenes in the first instalment, focusing on their separate kingdoms. Both actors expressed mutual respect and a shared vision for the ambitious project.

title: Delhi-Dehradun expressway inaugurated, but a house still holds up Loni ramp plan
content: A legal dispute over 1,600 sqm of land in Loni's Mandola is delaying a crucial ramp for the newly inaugurated Delhi-Saharanpur-Dehradun Economic Corridor. The unresolved compensation claim, dating back to 1998, has left a key stretch unfinished, creating an accident-prone area and impacting local connectivity.

title: 4 MP cops sleep on hospital bed, pee in dustbin, suspended
content: Four on-duty policemen in Sidhi, Madhya Pradesh, have been suspended after a video emerged showing them sleeping on a patient's bed and urinating in a hospital dustbin. The officers, guarding an undertrial prisoner, were reportedly heavily intoxicated. An inquiry confirmed their misconduct, raising serious questions about discipline within the force during sensitive duties.

title: DMK-Congress alliance strong, will secure two-third majority in Tamil Nadu election: Karnataka Deputy CM
content: He cautioned the youth and women against being influenced by rhetoric, remarking that “cinema dialogues last only for a day,” and claimed that only the Congress and the DMK could ensure welfare and development.

title: Union Minister H.D. Kumaraswamy hails Adichunchanagiri seer’s legacy of service
content: He noted that the late seer had worked extensively for the upliftment of the poor by providing access to education, shelter, and healthcare, and had taken quality medical services to rural areas, benefiting underprivileged communities

title: Noida workers’ protests: Two RJD spokespersons booked for sharing ‘misleading’ video, inciting tension
content: The RJD leaders have been accused of linking an incident in Madhya Pradesh, where a man was beaten up by police, to the ongoing labour protests in Noida, and of inciting tension by posting about the matter on X

content: Justice Bindal was elevated to the top court on February 13, 2023, and demitting office on April 15, 2026, with over three year tenure in which he authored over 100 judgements

title: South states will not lose due to delimitation, will clarify in Parliament: Centre
content: Amit Shah had assured party representatives, who met him in recent weeks, that the strength of the Lok Sabha would increase by 50%, to be distributed across States in their existing proportions — that is, a 50% increase in the number of Lok Sabha seats from each individual State

title: Will prioritise resolving Gorkha issue, withdraw cases against leaders after winning Bengal: Amit Shah
content: In the upcoming polls, the TMC is in a strategic seat-sharing alliance with the Anit Thapa-led Bharatiya Gorkha Prajatantrik Morcha (BJPM), a breakaway faction of Bimal Gurung's GJM

title: Constitution Amendment Bill on delimitation a biased move by Centre, alleges TVK chief Vijay
content: Mr. Vijay, in a social media post, demanded the Bill be withdrawn and that the status quo be maintained.

title: Delimitation move will reduce southern States’ voice: P. Chidambaram
content: Alleging a planned move, he said the timing coincided with peak election campaigning, making it difficult for Members of Parliament from Tamil Nadu and West Bengal to attend. He claimed this was intended to limit opposition to certain amendments.

title: Delimitation and Women’s reservation: Key parties’ stance
content: The plan to link women’s reservation in Parliament with delimitation has created a sharp political divide.

content: Nitish Kumar, the Chief Minister of Bihar and the longest-serving leader in the State’s history, is set to resign today, on April 14, 2026, after a remarkable 20-year tenure

content: Two senior leaders from the JD(U), Bijendra Prasad Yadav and Vijay Kumar Choudhary, also took oath as Ministers

content: The devotees, mostly residents of Main Majri, were returning after paying obeisance on the occasion of Baisakhi, the police said

content: The delimitation debate has to take into account the relative weights of individual electors and individual States

title: Supreme Court collegium recommends two women lawyers as Kerala High Court judges
content: The collegium held on April 14 approved the earlier recommendations made by the collegium of the Kerala High Court

title: How delimitation based on 2011 Census would redraw India’s political map
content: Southern and North-Eastern States stand to lose the most in seat share; Hindi heartland States gain disproportionately

title: Sakti power plant explosion: Death toll climbs to 16 in Chhattisgarh
content: While four victims died on the spot, others succumbed to their injuries soon after the incident, the officer said.

content: JD(U) leaders Vijay Kumar Choudhary and Bijendra Prasad Yadav administered oath as Ministers; they take charge as deputy CMs

title: Kerala yet to enforce system to monitor self-financing colleges
content: The self-financing college teachers and students are also not part of the statutes of the respective universities, claim functionaries of Self-Financing College Teachers’ and Staff Association

title: Jaishankar speaks to Israeli counterpart Gideon Sa'ar over ‘different aspects’ of West Asia crisis
content: The phone conversation between the two foreign ministers came amid reports of efforts by the U.S. and Iran to hold a fresh round of negotiations after the collapse of the initial dialogue in Islamabad

title: Udhayanidhi Stalin’s assets: Madras High Court calls for report from Director General of Income Tax
content: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan ask Additional Solicitor General AR.L. Sundaresan to file the report by April 20, 2026

title: Supreme Court stays Telangana HC order granting transit anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera
content: The case arises from a press conference addressed by Mr. Khera on April 4, 2026, in which he alleged that the Assam Chief Minister’s wife held three passports issued by different countries and levelled allegations of illegality against Mr. Sarma

title: SIR of Bihar’s electoral rolls and its political ripple effects across India: Data
content: A citizen from Bihar voting in their State and voting in Maharashtra or Kerala will have different implications

title: Andhra Pradesh intermediate results 2026 declared for over 10.15 lakh students
content: State Board of Intermediate Education declares A.P. Intermediate Results 2026 for 1st and 2nd year students; check pass percentage, toppers and district-wise results at bie.ap.gov.in

title: Tamil Nadu Elections: Where even the powerful can lose
content: In Tamil Nadu, even the most powerful leaders have faced defeat at the ballot box. From Chief Ministers to national icons, voters have repeatedly asserted their authority. This video looks at key electoral moments that prove one truth of Tamil Nadu politics: no leader is bigger than the voter.

title: Chief Ministers of Tamil Nadu who were defeated in elections
content: From the early years of Dravidian politics to more recent decades, voters have not hesitated to defeat stalwarts, even Chief Ministers

title: YSRCP’s Pudi Srihari detained by Chittoor police over social media posts targeting Chandrababu Naidu
content: YSRCP alleged its media wing general secretary Pudi Srihari was detained near Jagan Mohan Reddy’s Tadepalli residence over social media posts targeting the Chief Minister

title: Youth held in Maharashtra’s Amravati for circulating obscene clips of women
content: Rajya Sabha member Anil Bonde, who hails from Amravati, demanded a probe into the matter by a Special Investigation Team

title: PM Modi a ‘misleader’, engaged in ‘deliberate deceit’ over delimitation: Congress
content: Congress general secretary in-charge communications Jairam Ramesh said that the prime minister is a so-called leader whose only distinguishing feature is his unmatched ability to be a ‘misleader’

title: Constitution Amendment Bill proposes possible change in size of State Assemblies
content: The proposed amendments, in effect, mean that State Assemblies will see a change in their total number of seats, depending on population changes and constituency boundaries within States will also be redrawn as part of the delimitation exercise

title: FIFA wishes Malayalees on Vishu, posts AI-generated picture of Messi alongside traditional Vishu Kani
content: The FIFA World Cup page also brightened the propitious day for Keralites by conveying the international sports body’s Vishu Greetings in Malayalam, “Vishu Ashamsakal”.

title: Two women injured while attempting to disembark from moving train at Ramanathapuram railway station
content: Upon investigation, it was found that the women had overslept in the ladies compartment even after the train had reached their destination

title: Samrat Choudhary | Bihar’s saffron face
content: As Nitish Kumar is likely to resign this week, the Deputy Chief Minister is the frontrunner to be the BJP’s first Chief Minister of the State

title: Cat ‘custody’ row between neighbours ends amicably after Hoysala police intervention in Bengaluru
content: Tensions escalated when the female cat’s owners brought the kittens to their neighbour’s house and demanded that the latter assume responsibility for raising them, claiming their pet was the ‘father’

title: PM arrives at HAL airport in Bengaluru
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is heading to the Adichunchanagiri Mutt in Nagamangala taluk of Mandya district

title: Top 10 tips to play and win ESPN fantasy women's basketball like the pros
content: the WNBA and the player's union negotiated a new collective bargaining agreement . there is opportunity for unprecedented player movement during the free agency window . we should start our discussion on ways to win at fantasy hoops this season .

title: What makes a good pinch hitter in 2026? One manager might have revealed the secret
content: skip Schumaker breaks down the virtues of utility player Tyler Wade . "coming off the bench is real," he says . if you have short swings, it's really challenging to produce in a pinch-hit type of role .

title: Fury is back at heavyweight; where does he land?
content: Tyson Fury ends his short-lived retirement by routing arslanbek Makhmudov . the win allows Fury to return to the rankings at heavyweight after a brief absence . "The Gypsy King" slots in at No. 2 behind the only man to have beaten him in his pro career, Oleksandr Usyk .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .

title: 'The ouch that runs his mouth': Hokit roars into MMA heavyweight rankings
content: the undefeated hokit defeats onetime heavyweight title challenger Curtis Blaydes . the two put on a slugfest for the ages, combining for a division-record 351 significant strikes . he finds himself at no. 7 in the heavyweight top 10 .

title: Predicting the entire NBA postseason -- with a surprise champion
content: the postseason is set to begin this week . we'll use ESPN's basketball power index to fill in the four teams projected to advance out of the play-in tournament . despite the gap in seeds, these teams have similar profile .

title: Fantasy baseball news: Merrill Kelly ready to return to rotation for Diamondbacks
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . a longtime starter whom most fantasy managers ignored for good reason . Eric Karabell Jakob Junis has never thrown particularly hard when compared to his peers, never piled on strikeouts and permitted nearly a hit per inning .

title: Reid's final draft rankings: Stacking the top 500 players
content: the 2026 draft is a little more than a week away, as the first round begins on April 23 in Pittsburgh . the final rankings are based on my own scouting . each player gets a round grade here, and I have also included my rankings by position at the bottom .

title: 'You'll see a TN not seen before': Stalin warns of 1960s-like anti-Hindi stir pushes delimitation
